neighborhoods.name: Galway City Centre / Latin Quarter
neighborhoods.description: Bohemian city center with buskers, colorful shopfronts on Quay Street, and a vibrant arts festival scene
neighborhoods.character: Bohemian, artistic, musical, walkable and lively

housing.predominantType: Apartments in Georgian and renovated buildings

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Galway. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Salthill
neighborhoods.description: Seaside neighborhood with the famous promenade, Blackrock diving tower, and Atlantic views
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Galway's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Tuam Road Area
neighborhoods.description: Northern commuter area with newer developments and lower housing costs than the city center
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Oranmore
neighborhoods.description: East Galway commuter village with a medieval castle, bay views, and family-oriented community
neighborhoods.character: Village commuter, bay views, family community

housing.predominantType: Modern estate houses and coastal properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
